speaker: David
text: Hi, this is David Van Noy with Van Noy Real Estate. I saw your home is for sale by owner — quick question, why are you selling and where are you headed next?

speaker: Seller
text: We're relocating for a job. Honestly I don't want to pay a commission though.

speaker: David
text: Totally fair. Let me show you net-to-net — what you'd actually keep FSBO versus listed. We also have a 2% option and an Offer Guaranteed program.

speaker: Seller
text: Hmm, maybe. Can you just send me some info?

speaker: David
text: Sure, I'll put something together and email it over.
